description: WunderGraph builds Cosmo, an open-source GraphQL federation platform for managing supergraphs, routing, schema registry, and analytics. It is offered as both self-hosted software and a managed cloud service.
summary: WunderGraph exposes a developer CLI (`wgc`) and two MCP surfaces: a local stdio Cosmo MCP Server via the CLI, plus the Cosmo Router MCP Gateway; both are part of its GraphQL federation platform docs, with API-key auth confirmed for the CLI-based surfaces and router-gateway auth/config documented but endpoint mechanics not fully exposed in the public docs reviewed.
